understand.blurb: China's economy, politics, society, history and culture, explained in your language.

intelligence.blurb: Chinese manufacturing and China-Latin America trade updates, delivered as automated briefings.

suppliers.blurb: Verified Chinese factories: certifications, catalogs and direct contact. No middlemen.

inquiries.blurb: Send your request for quotation (RFQ) and negotiate directly with the supplier. You settle payment between yourselves.

community.blurb: Publish and read sourcing experiences and market analysis from other importers.

developers.blurb: Connect your blog, store or AI agent to our open /api/v1.
